Welcome to CloudPlatform

Scale Your Business Without Limits

Join 50,000+ companies using CloudPlatform to deploy, manage, and scale their applications globally.

Why Teams Choose CloudPlatform

99.99% Uptime Guarantee

Our globally distributed infrastructure ensures your applications are always available. We back it with an SLA.

Pay Only for What You Use

No minimum commitments. Scale up during peak times, scale down when quiet. Billing by the second.

Deploy in 60 Seconds

Push code and watch it go live. Automatic SSL, CDN, and edge caching included.

Enterprise Security

SOC 2 Type II certified. GDPR compliant. Your data encrypted at rest and in transit.

What Our Customers Say

"CloudPlatform reduced our deployment time from hours to minutes. Game changer for our team."

— CTO, FastGrowth Startup

"We migrated from AWS and cut our cloud costs by 40% while improving performance."

— VP Engineering, Enterprise Corp

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

  • Starter: Free for hobby projects
  • Pro: $20/month per team member
  • Enterprise: Custom pricing for large teams
